_comment_webhook: Prefer setting env var TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL (keeps the secret out of this file). Paste here only for quick local tests.
_comment_feeds: Log in to GeBiz as a Trading Partner > Opportunities search > click the RSS icon on each relevant procurement category, then paste the feed URLs below. Add one block per category (e.g. Construction, Facilities Management, Logistics).
_comment_listing: Optional fallback while RSS URLs are not set up: public GeBiz pages to scan (best-effort text scan, less reliable than RSS).
